final:
module RefModule(
    input [1:0] ctrl,
    input [3:0] data_in,
    output reg [3:0] data_out
);
    always @(*) begin
        case(ctrl)
            2'b00: data_out = 4'b0000;            // Power off
            2'b01: data_out = data_in;            // Pass through
            2'b10: data_out = ~data_in;           // Invert
            2'b11: data_out = (data_in + 1) % 16; // Increment
            default: data_out = 4'b0000;          // Default case
        endcase
    end
endmodule
